verification.title: Verify your email address
verification.body: Welcome to TaskFlow! Your account has been successfully created. To activate your dashboard and start managing your tasks, please click the button below:
verification.footer: If you did not create an account on our website, please ignore this email. This link is valid for 24 hours.

invoice.title: Invoice #{{invoiceNumber}} for your subscription
invoice.amount: The total amount of {{amount}} {{currency}} has been processed.
invoice.thank_you: Thank you for trusting our platform. If you have any questions, please contact our support team.
